assessment.note: She is still decoding 'unwritten rules in every meeting,' which signals mild strain and a clear role-environment ambiguity.

new_queue.label: Unwritten rules
new_queue.name: These 'unwritten rules' — where do they show up most for you right now?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific meetings or situations where hidden norms are creating confusion.

new_queue.label: Decision ownership
new_queue.name: What decisions do you feel fully clear you own end to end?
new_queue.description: Tests where decision rights are already crisp versus still fuzzy.

new_queue.label: Unclear edges
new_queue.name: Where does the boundary of your role still feel fuzzy?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the parts of scope that are still ambiguous in practice.

new_queue.label: First friction
new_queue.name: What is still slowing you down when priorities conflict?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the specific friction point that is hardest to move through right now.

new_queue.label: Consensus drag
new_queue.name: What part of alignment is creating the most extra cycle for you?
new_queue.description: Finds where consensus-seeking is slowing execution or adding noise.

new_queue.label: Steadier next steps
new_queue.name: What support from me would make the next two weeks steadier for you?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the discussion into concrete support and next-step commitment.
